description:
You are a Construction Manager setting up phase milestones for a building renovation project in Redmine. Using the project identifier, issue numbers, URL, and credentials provided in ~/task_brief.txt, create four versions for the project with the status 'open' and sharing set to 'Not shared':

- Name: "Phase 1 - Demolition & Site Prep", Due date: 2025-08-15, Description: "Site clearing, selective demolition, and hazardous material abatement."
- Name: "Phase 2 - Structural Work", Due date: 2025-10-31, Description: "Foundation reinforcement, steel erection, and concrete work."
- Name: "Phase 3 - MEP Installation", Due date: 2026-01-15, Description: "Mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems installation."
- Name: "Phase 4 - Finishing & Inspection", Due date: 2026-03-31, Description: "Interior finishing, final inspections, and punch list resolution."

Assign the two issues identified in ~/task_brief.txt to the "Phase 1 - Demolition & Site Prep" version.
